creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
The package didnt got built on the cluster.

Reason:

=> v0.4.1.mod doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/go/www_websocketd/websocketd-v0.4.1.
=> Attempting to fetch https://proxy.golang.org/github.com/joewalnes/websocketd/@v/v0.4.1.mod
fetch: https://proxy.golang.org/github.com/joewalnes/websocketd/@v/v0.4.1.mod: size mismatch: expected 95, actual 84
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/go/www_websocketd/websocketd-v0.4.1/v0.4.1.mod
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/go/www_websocketd/websocketd-v0.4.1/v0.4.1.mod: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/go/www_websocketd/websocketd-v0.4.1 and try again.
*** Error code 1
